title: Isla and the Mystery of the Missing Bananas
synopsis: When all the bananas disappear from Sunny Zoo, young detective Isla teams up with her animal friends to solve the mystery. Through clever clues and teamwork, they discover the surprising truth behind the missing fruit.

pages.text: Isla loved visiting Sunny Zoo every Saturday. She had curly red hair and big brown eyes that sparkled when she smiled. Today felt different, though. The animals seemed upset. "What's wrong, friends?" Isla asked. Maya the monkey swung down from her tree. "All our bananas are gone!" she cried. "Every single one!"

illustration.description: A young girl with curly red hair and big brown eyes stands at the entrance of a colorful zoo. A worried-looking monkey with expressive features hangs from a tree branch above her. The zoo has bright, cheerful buildings in the background with rainbow-colored signs.
illustration.alt: Isla meeting Maya the monkey at Sunny Zoo

pages.text: Isla looked around the zoo. All the banana trees were empty! Even the banana stand near the gift shop had nothing left. "This is a mystery," Isla said, putting on her thinking face. She pulled out her small notebook and pencil. "Don't worry, Maya. I'll help you find those bananas!"

illustration.description: Isla holds a small purple notebook and yellow pencil, looking determined. Behind her are empty banana trees with no fruit, and a sad monkey sits on a branch. The zoo pathway is sunny with bright flowers lining the walkway.
illustration.alt: Isla with her notebook, investigating the empty banana trees

pages.text: "Where should we start looking?" asked Maya. Isla tapped her pencil on her chin. "Let's ask the other animals. Maybe they saw something." They walked to the elephant area first. Kofi the elephant was spraying water on his back. "Good morning, Kofi!" called Isla. "Have you seen any bananas today?"

illustration.description: A friendly elephant with big expressive eyes sprays water from his trunk while a girl and monkey approach. The elephant enclosure has lush green plants and a small waterfall. The elephant has a gentle, wise expression.
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya talking to Kofi the elephant

pages.text: Kofi stopped spraying water and thought carefully. "I did see something strange early this morning," he said slowly. "There were yellow peels on the ground near the lion area." Isla wrote this down in her notebook. "Banana peels! That's our first clue!" Maya clapped her hands excitedly.

illustration.description: The elephant points his trunk toward a path while Isla writes eagerly in her notebook. Maya jumps up and down with excitement. Yellow banana peels are scattered on the ground nearby, glinting in the morning sunlight.
illustration.alt: Kofi pointing out banana peels while Isla takes notes

pages.text: They hurried to the lion area. Zara the lion was napping in the shade. "Excuse me, Zara," whispered Isla. The lion opened one golden eye. "Did you eat bananas this morning?" Zara stretched and yawned. "Lions don't eat bananas, little detective. But I heard lots of munching sounds from the turtle pond."

illustration.description: A majestic lioness with a golden mane lies under a shady tree, one eye open looking at Isla and Maya. Her expression is amused and sleepy. The lion enclosure has tall grass and acacia trees with dappled sunlight.
illustration.alt: Zara the lion giving Isla and Maya information about the turtle pond

pages.text: At the turtle pond, they found Sage the old turtle sunning herself on a rock. "Hello, Sage," said Isla politely. "We're looking for missing bananas." Sage blinked slowly. "I saw someone with yellow fruit this morning. They went toward the playground behind the zoo. Big someone. Very quiet."

illustration.description: An ancient-looking turtle with wise, kind eyes sits on a warm rock by a crystal blue pond. Lily pads float on the water's surface. Isla kneels down to talk to the turtle while Maya peers over her shoulder curiously.
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya questioning Sage the turtle by the pond

pages.text: Isla and Maya walked to the playground behind the zoo. It was quiet and empty. But wait! There were more banana peels on the ground. "Look!" pointed Maya. "The trail leads to those big bushes!" Isla felt a little nervous, but she was brave. "Let's see what's hiding there."

illustration.description: A colorful playground with swings and slides sits empty. A trail of yellow banana peels leads from the playground equipment toward thick, green bushes. Isla looks determined but slightly nervous while Maya points excitedly at the trail.
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya following banana peel clues at the playground

pages.text: They crept quietly toward the bushes. Isla pushed aside some leaves and gasped. Behind the bushes sat Benny, the biggest gorilla from the zoo! He was surrounded by banana peels and had yellow banana mush all over his face. "Benny!" exclaimed Maya. "You took all our bananas!"

illustration.description: A large, gentle gorilla sits behind lush green bushes, surrounded by banana peels. His face is covered with yellow banana mush and he looks guilty but cute. Isla and Maya peek through the leaves with surprised expressions.
illustration.alt: Discovering Benny the gorilla with banana evidence

pages.text: Benny hung his big head sadly. "I'm sorry," he said in his deep voice. "I was so hungry this morning. I couldn't help myself." Isla felt sorry for him. "But Benny, why didn't you ask for help?" The gorilla looked up with tears in his eyes. "I was embarrassed. I ate all my breakfast yesterday and was still hungry."

illustration.description: Benny the gorilla looks ashamed with his head hanging low. Tears glisten in his large, expressive eyes. Isla reaches out her hand toward him with a compassionate expression while Maya looks sympathetic too.
illustration.alt: Benny the gorilla explaining why he took the bananas

pages.text: "Don't be sad, Benny," said Isla kindly. "Everyone gets extra hungry sometimes." Maya nodded. "But next time, just ask us for help!" Isla had an idea. "Let's go tell the zookeepers what happened. I bet they can get more bananas for everyone."

illustration.description: Isla places her small hand on Benny's large finger in a comforting gesture. Maya gives Benny an encouraging smile. The gorilla's expression shows hope and gratitude. Sunlight filters through the leaves creating a warm, forgiving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya comforting Benny the gorilla

pages.text: They found Ms. Rodriguez, the head zookeeper, near the gift shop. She had kind eyes and wore a green uniform. "We solved the mystery of the missing bananas!" announced Isla proudly. She explained everything that happened. Ms. Rodriguez smiled. "Thank you for being such a good detective, Isla. And thank you for being honest, Benny."

illustration.description: A friendly zookeeper with dark hair in a ponytail wears a green uniform and has a warm smile. She stands with Isla, Maya, and Benny near a colorful gift shop. Her expression shows appreciation and understanding.
illustration.alt: Ms. Rodriguez the zookeeper listening to Isla's report

pages.text: Soon, the zoo had fresh bananas for everyone. Benny got extra portions so he wouldn't be hungry. All the animals were happy again. "You're the best detective ever!" said Maya, giving Isla a big hug. Isla grinned. "It was teamwork that solved this mystery. We all helped each other!" And they all shared a delicious banana snack together.

illustration.description: All the animal friends sit together sharing fresh bananas in a sunny clearing. Isla sits in the middle smiling widely while Maya, Kofi, Zara, Sage, and Benny all enjoy their fruit. Everyone looks happy and content in this celebration scene.
illustration.alt: All the friends sharing bananas together after solving the mystery

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was missing from Sunny Zoo?
questions.explanation: All the bananas were missing from the zoo, which is why Maya the monkey was upset.

questions.question: Who helped Isla find the first clue?
questions.explanation: Kofi the elephant told Isla about the banana peels he saw near the lion area.

questions.question: Where did Isla find Benny hiding?
questions.explanation: Benny was hiding behind the bushes near the playground with all the banana evidence.

questions.question: Why did Benny take all the bananas?
choices: He wanted to play a trick
questions.explanation: Benny ate all his breakfast the day before and was still very hungry the next morning.

questions.question: How did the story end?
questions.explanation: The zoo got fresh bananas for everyone, and all the friends shared a snack together happily.

pages.title: Complete the Mystery
pages.instructions: Fill in the blanks to retell Isla's adventure!
pages.text: Isla was a young _____ who loved solving mysteries. When all the _____ went missing from Sunny Zoo, she used her _____ to write down clues. She asked _____ the elephant, Zara the _____, and Sage the turtle for help. Finally, she found _____ the gorilla hiding behind the bushes with banana peels everywhere!
